title: Support gardening work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support gardening work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for gardening work

pcs.text: Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to job requirements.

pcs.text: Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use correct manual handling techniques when loading and unloading materials.

pcs.text: Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report faulty or unsafe tools, equipment and PPE to supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and report workplace hazards to supervisor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake gardening work in a safe and environmentally appropriate manner.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor.
